findings.message: Lifecycle script executes shell commands via curl piped to bash. This runs automatically on npm install.

Reads sensitive environment variable GITHUB_TOKEN. Combined with network access, this enables credential theft.

entries.name: tailx
entries.description: Live system cognition engine. Reimagines tail from "show me lines" to "what's happening, what matters, and why?" Auto-detects log formats, groups patterns, detects anomalies, reconstructs traces, outputs structured JSON for AI agents. 144 KB. Zero config. 69K events/sec.
